title: AA's Packs
description: A pack slowly becoming less Vanilla with every mod but more cool mods
body:
Notable Features :
- [Storage Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagedrawers) (For mass storage management)
- [Antique Atlas 4](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4) (More interesting than a minimap)
- [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) (I like Chakrams :])
- [Wither's Wrath](https://modrinth.com/mod/witherswrath)
- [True Ending](https://modrinth.com/mod/true-ending) (*Insert end pun here*)
- [Terratonic](https://modrinth.com/mod/terratonic) (Purple Biomes :O)
- Truly Modular : (Because who doesn't love customization & silly combos?)
  - [Archery](https://modrinth.com/mod/truly-modular-archery)
  - [Armory](https://modrinth.com/mod/truly-modular-armory)
  - [Arsenal](https://modrinth.com/mod/truly-modular-arsenal)
- [Farmers Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)
  - With Addons! (Pandesal my beloved)

Used [Item Obliterator](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-obliterator) to remove Runic & unique weapons from [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) (Might find an entity version for ocean creepers from [Creeper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul)).

Will reinclude [Snow! Real Magic! ⛄](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-real-magic) when it does not cause servers to crash with [Truly Modular API](https://modrinth.com/mod/modular-item-api).


<details>
<summary>Mods & Datapacks</summary>
